feed.title: Michael Huang
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: IIFire: Intelligent firefighting system based on IoT & FAHP algorithm

link.title: IIFire: Intelligent firefighting system based on IoT & FAHP algorithm

entry.summary: Design Overview IIFire, or Intelligent IoT Firefighting System, is an integrated system deployed on government servers of Shanghai fire brigade, which detects potential fire hazard and report real-life fire alarms in buildings to save people’s life and money. Currently, IIFire is connected with over 7 million IoT devices. IIFire provides a solution for better pre-warning of f...

entry.title: SmarTemp: Temperature Measure & Manage Assistant
entry.summary: Design Background In COVID-19 pandemic, to prevent any potential spread of disease, it’s common in China to measure and record people’s body temperatures before getting into communities, schools, workplaces and public transportation. But it’s inefficient to do so manually with only pen and paper, especially when people are queuing up in morning peak (unfortunately this is most of the c...

entry.title: Simple MIPS CPU Simulator Written in Verilog

link.title: Simple MIPS CPU Simulator Written in Verilog

entry.summary: Documentation This project is a course project in VE370 Computer Organization @UM-SJTU Joint Institute. In general, we implement an simple simulator of MIPS CPU with both single-cycle and pipeline version in Verilog, which can fetch machine code from files and simulate the CPU processing. You can find the source code in my Github repo. Supporting MIPS Instruction Set The memory-reference...

entry.title: Google Chrome T-rex Runner but an Embedded Version

link.title: Google Chrome T-rex Runner but an Embedded Version

entry.summary: Documentation This project is a course project in CS/ECE353 Microprocessor Systems @University of Wisconsin-Madison. In general, we implement an embedded version of Google Chrome’s T-rex Runner with some more interesting features using FreeRTOS. You can find the source code in my Github repo. Game Rules Basic Google Chrome’s dinosaur T-rex runner game rules with following addional features:...

entry.title: Mumsh: A Mini Shell Written in C

link.title: Mumsh: A Mini Shell Written in C

entry.summary: Documentation This project is originated from a course project in VE482 Operating System @UM-SJTU Joint Institute. In this project, a mini shell called mumsh is implemented with programming language C for Unix-like machine. You can find the source code in my Github repo. Change Log [2022/2/19] Add feature: Command history auto-completion with smart search [2022/2/15] Add feature: T...
